parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_pwin_scores (opportunity, agency, pwin, weighted_score, recommendation, scores, breakdown, gates, notes, assessed_by, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6::jsonb, $7::jsonb, $8::jsonb, $9, $10, NOW()) RETURNING id

options.queryParameters: ={{ JSON.stringify([$json.opportunity||'', $json.agency||'', parseFloat($json.pwin)||0, parseFloat($json.weighted_score)||0, $json.recommendation||'', JSON.stringify($json.scores||{}), JSON.stringify($json.breakdown||{}), JSON.stringify($json.gates||{}), $json.notes||'', $json.assessed_by||'system']) }}

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM gda_pwin_scores ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', action: 'list', scores: $input.all().map(function(i) { return i.json; }), count: $input.all().length }) }}

parameters.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_pwin_scores (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, opportunity TEXT NOT NULL, agency TEXT, pwin INTEGER NOT NULL, weighted_score NUMERIC(4,2), recommendation VARCHAR(30), scores JSONB DEFAULT '{}', breakdown JSONB DEFAULT '[]', gates JSONB DEFAULT '{}', notes TEXT, assessed_by TEXT, pursuit_id TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pwin_opp ON gda_pwin_scores(opportunity); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pwin_date ON gda_pwin_scores(created_at DESC); SELECT 'gda_pwin_scores ready' AS status;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid action. Use: calculate, list, setup' }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT cp.id as plan_id, cp.plan_data->>'gate_stage' as gate_stage, cp.plan_data->>'teaming_partner' as teaming_partner, cp.plan_data->>'past_performance_ref' as past_performance_ref, cp.plan_data->>'capture_manager' as capture_manager, ot.solicitation_number, ot.estimated_value, ot.agency FROM gda_capture_plans cp LEFT JOIN gda_opportunity_tracker ot ON ot.id::text = cp.plan_data->>'opp_id' WHERE cp.plan_data->>'opportunity_name' ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' OR ot.title ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' ORDER BY cp.updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT weight_key, weight_value, confidence FROM gda_learned_weights WHERE weight_key LIKE 'pwin.%' ORDER BY weight_key;
